caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a dark vest stands before a group of seated people in a room with wood-paneled walls. He is speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands. The audience, seen from behind, includes people wearing a variety of clothing, such as a maroon jacket and a yellow shirt. Some individuals are seated closer to the speaker, while others are further back. To the right of the speaker, a small white sign with the text "ORCA" is visible. The frames show the man speaking and the audience listening, with minimal movement between the frames, suggesting a steady, focused presentation. The lighting is consistent throughout, and the scene remains stationary as the speaker continues his address to the assembled group.
